name: IskoChatAI
description: A specialized RAG-based chatbot designed to navigate the complexities of Philippine scholarship and enrollment processes. Engineered a system that retrieves real-time data from Google Docs and Custom Search APIs to provide accurate, 'Taglish' responses.

name: Underwater Sealife Crab and Solid Waste Detection (YOLOv8)
description: Freelance project implementing a real-time object detection system using YOLOv8 to identify and differentiate between marine life (crabs) and anthropogenic solid waste in underwater environments. Trained on a public 10k image dataset to address the visual challenges of aquatic environments.

name: Plant Disease Classification using ResNet
description: A ResNet-powered deep learning project that automates the classification of 15 plant disease categories across peppers, potatoes, and tomatoes. Leveraging Residual Learning and Computer Vision, the model achieves 96% accuracy, providing a high-precision solution for early crop diagnosis.

name: Handwritten Baybayin Classification using Custom CNN
description: A custom CNN in PyTorch that classifies handwritten Baybayin script, a traditional pre-colonial Philippine writing system. Using an EMNIST-style dataset, the model handles complex stroke patterns and diacritics (kudlits), achieving an overall accuracy of 89.5%.

name: Unsupervised KNN Recommender System
description: An Unsupervised KNN Recommender System that identifies similar weaponry within the game Terraria. Built with Scikit-Learn, the model analyzes weapon attributes to suggest mathematically 'near' alternatives to a given item. Includes extensive Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA).

name: PUP Graduate School Alumni Website
description: Freelance project as a core Frontend Developer in a three-person team. Co-engineered and deployed a high-impact alumni portal designed for Tracer Study Research. The platform successfully onboarded 130+ alumni, earning client praise for its intuitive UI and data collection efficiency.
